title: ayenia standleyi
intro: Ayenia standleyi is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the barometer bush due to its ability to indicate humidity levels. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ayenia standleyi include reduced inflammation and improved wound healing, as well as its ability to combat various infections. Herbal preparations of Ayenia standleyi can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often utilized in traditional medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
